title: WelcomeScreen
description: Add a welcome screen which displays information about a server/world/modpack
body:
[![ServerAtelier](https://www.serveratelier.com/assets/themes/atelier/assets/images/banner/sa_budget.png)](https://www.serveratelier.com/) ![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/b2bipjj.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/WelcomeScreen/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/WelcomeScreen/issues)


WelcomeScreen let you create a welcome screen where you can share information about your server, world or modpack. It will open up on the players first join of the world. A screen can be build via a datapack (and resourcepack if resources are needed). Check out the github readme for information. ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/Aka3bc1.png)

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
